package rulefixtures

// scenario for duplicate_struct_tag_key: Struct field tags that repeat the same key more than once.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: consistency; severity: contextual.
type Rule229PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario229Positive(records []Rule229PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
